rulings.Case Title: GIGI ELLIS VS. DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 17, 2013, line 3. DEFENDANT DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY AND CALIFORNIA RECONVEYANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is overruled as to causes of action 1 (Cancellation of Deed); 2 (Quiet Title); 4 (Wrongful Foreclosure); 5 (Violation of B&P 17200; 7 (Slander of Title); 9 (Declaratory Releif). Complaint sufficiently alleges that on June 11, 2009 Deutsche Bank was not the beneficiary under DOT either pursuant to (1) Assignment allegedly executed on June 12, 2009; or (2) any other unrecorded assignment, FAC 4:24-26. Sustained with leave to amend as to 3 (Fraud) to allege facts showing tolling of statute of limitations; 6 (IIED) to allege severe emotional distress; 8 (Wrongful Eviction) to allege all elements of this cause of action against each defendant. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: HEATHER DANIELS VS. MERIDIAN FORECLOSURE SERVICE, FKA MTDS INC., et al

Plaintiff is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copies of the opposition to department 501 no later that April 26, 2013 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: DEUSTCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE VS. ANA MILAYRO SARAVIA et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 17, 2013, line 8. DEFENDANT ANA SARAVIA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Sustained with leave to amend as to the failure to provide access, to allege and good faith that access was denied after service of Notice. Also, failure to disclose the amount of rent and breach of covenant of good faith are not just causes for eviction under San Francisco Rent Ordinance. = (501/AJR)
